Products

What I create

Request custom order
Made to order

Bowls & Vessels

Hand-turned bowls from solid wood. Each with unique grain and knot patterns. Natural beauty that will last for generations.

from 800 CZK

Made to order

Spice Mills

Pepper and salt mills with CrushGrind Diamond mechanism featuring ceramic grinding. These unique mechanisms come with a 25-year warranty and are excellent for grinding salt and pepper. Adjustable to 14 levels – from coarse to fine. Made from solid oak, handcrafted – each piece is one of a kind. Height 25 cm, made to order.

from 900 CZK

Made to order

Cutting Boards

Hardwood cutting boards with engraved patterns or text. Practical and decorative. Perfect as a unique, personal gift for birthdays or anniversaries.

from 700 CZK

Made to order

Dog Accessories

Wooden stands and bowls for your four-legged friends. Natural oak, stainless steel bowl. Safe for dogs. Engraving of a name or company logo available.

from 1 200 CZK

About

František Meca

I have been working wood by hand since I was old enough to hold a chisel. I grew up in the Beskydy mountains, surrounded by forests and people who believed that honest work speaks for itself.

I spend hours at the lathe in the silence of the workshop. I listen to how the wood responds to the tool, where it wants to go, what it wants to become. Every piece has its own character – and I try to gently reveal it.

I do not mass produce. I do not rush. I make pieces that are meant to last for generations. I ship across the Czech Republic and abroad.

20+let u soustruhu
100%handcrafted
∞unique pieces

— František Meca
